description: Style NoteLeather loafers from arrow for men which is a spin off of the classic penny loafers. This mid-top pair has a leather strap above its mouth. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles.Product DetailsRed leather slip-on with overlays and stitched detailingPadded footbed and innerThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with herringbone and patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
